productDisplayName: Puma Men Breeze Blue Flip Flops
description: Whether you're heading to the pool, beach or just a chilled-out evening, these Breeze flip flops from puma are a great and practical addition to your casual footwear. Slip into these soft and comfortable flip flops after a long day's work and make your feet feel like they are in heaven!UpperSuper soft synthetic straps with an adjustable velcro closure for ease of wear and durabilityToe separator for enhanced grip and comfortSoft and padded rubber footbed with puma logo embossed for enhanced comfort and styleOutsoleTPU outsole with multi directional lugs, brand name and logo embossed for maximum grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
